title: Parent Rights Classes - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Parent Rights Classes 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FAMILIES FIRST PARENT RESOURCE CENTER CHILDREN IN BETWEEN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Education program for divorcing families endorsed by judges, lawyers, and mediators. Provides information about loyalty conflicts, and how to decrease the blame children put on themselves when their parents divorce. Parents gain better communication skills, can reduce conflict. 401 S Canyon Boulevard John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 575-1438 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON JUDICIAL BRANCH PARENT EDUCATION CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides listings for parent education programs.. The classes focus on how to help children adjust to a divorce or separation and/or living apart from a parent and also provide information to parents about developing skills for successful co-parenting as separated parents. 1163 State Street Salem, OR 973012563 Eligibility: Families facing separation or divorce or filing for custody changes and other modifications with children younger than age 17 Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILIES FIRST PARENT RESOURCE CENTER CHILDREN IN BETWEEN OREGON JUDICIAL BRANCH PARENT EDUCATION CLASSES
